name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
ForkHeldBy(i, j) == forks[i] = j

PhilosopherThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
PhilosopherHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
PhilosopherEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Actions *)
TakeFork(i, j) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![j] = i]
PutFork(i, j) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![j] = 0]
Think(i) == states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
Hungry(i) == states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
Eat(i) == states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Next action *)
Next == 
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       PhilosopherThinking(i) /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i)) /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i)) 
       /\ TakeFork(i, LEFT(i)) 
       /\ TakeFork(i, RIGHT(i)) 
       /\ Eat(i)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       PhilosopherEating(i) 
       /\ PutFork(i, LEFT(i)) 
       /\ PutFork(i, RIGHT(i)) 
       /\ Think(i)

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, count

Init == /\ queue = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
      /\ head' = head
         /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
         /\ count' = count + 1
         /\ queue' = Append(queue, head)
  \/ /\ count > 0
      /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
         /\ tail' = tail
         /\ count' = count - 1
         /\ queue' = Tail(queue)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<queue, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
           /\ votedFor' = NULL
           /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ r \notin readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLE store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

Next == /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, ballots, values
\* Highest promised ballot among acceptors
HighestPromisedBallot == 
  IF acceptors = {} THEN 0


\* Highest accepted ballot among acceptors
HighestAcceptedBallot == 
  IF acceptors = {} THEN 0


\* Value with highest accepted ballot
HighestAcceptedValue == 
  IF acceptors = {} THEN {}

    LET maxBallot == HighestAcceptedBallot
    IN IF maxBallot = 0 THEN {}

         LET maxAcceptors == {p \in acceptors : accepts[p] = maxBallot}
         IN IF maxAcceptors = {} THEN {}

              LET maxValue == 

                      Head({v \in values : v \in maxAcceptors})

                      Head({v \in values : v \in maxAcceptors}) \* Tie-breaking
              IN maxValue

\* Initial state
Init == 
  /\ acceptors = {1, 2, 3} \* Example set of acceptors
  /\ proposers = {1, 2} \* Example set of proposers
  /\ promises = [p \in acceptors |-> 0]
  /\ accepts = [p \in acceptors |-> 0]
  /\ chosen = {}
  /\ ballots = [p \in proposers |-> 0]
  /\ values = [p \in proposers |-> {}]

\* Next-state relation
Next == 
  \/ \E p \in proposers :
       /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = ballots[p] + 1]
       /\ values' = [values EXCEPT ![p] = values[p]]
       /\ promises' = promises
       /\ accepts' = accepts
       /\ chosen' = chosen
  \/ \E p \in proposers : \E a \in acceptors :
       /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = ballots[p]]
       /\ accepts' = accepts
       /\ chosen' = chosen
       /\ ballots' = ballots
       /\ values' = values
  \/ \E p \in proposers : \E a \in acceptors :
       /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = ballots[p]]
       /\ promises' = promises
       /\ chosen' = chosen
       /\ ballots' = ballots
       /\ values' = values
  \/ \E a \in acceptors : \E v \in values :
       /\ chosen' = chosen \cup {v}
       /\ promises' = promises
       /\ accepts' = accepts
       /\ ballots' = ballots
       /\ values' = values

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, ballots, values>>

\* Type invariant
TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in SUBSET Nat
  /\ proposers \in SUBSET Nat
  /\ promises \in acceptors -> Nat
  /\ accepts \in acceptors -> Nat
  /\ chosen \in SUBSET values
  /\ ballots \in proposers -> Nat
  /\ values \in proposers -> Nat

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES channel, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) \div CHUNK_SIZE |-> SubSeq(file, i, i + CHUNK_SIZE - 1)

            SubSeq(file, i, Len(file))]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    /\ channel' = channel
    /\ IF Len(sentChunks) < Len(chunks) THEN
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(chunks))
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, Head(chunks))
        /\ retransmitCount' = 0

        /\ IF retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES THEN
            /\ channel' = Append(channel, Last(sentChunks))
            /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1

            /\ channel' = channel
            /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>

====
